name: dev.threadmine/mcp
description: Analyze JVM thread dumps with ThreadMine: deadlocks, CPU spikes, pool exhaustion, health score.

environmentVariables.name: THREADMINE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: ThreadMine API key (create at app.threadmine.dev, Settings > API Keys)

environmentVariables.name: THREADMINE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the ThreadMine API endpoint (default: https://api.threadmine.dev)
